name: Green Bean and Red Onion Salad with Radish Dressing
recipeIngredient: 5 radishes, unpeeled and trimmed, coarsely chopped
4 cups mixed greens (such as red leaf lettuce and baby spinach), torn into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the mixed greens in a bowl.
2. Place 5 radishes in a food processor with olive oil, vinegar, mustard, and garlic. Process until a thick dressing forms. Season with salt and pepper. Transfer to a small bowl. (Can be made up to 1 day ahead. Cover; chill. Bring to room temperature before using.)
3. Cook the green beans in a large pot of boiling salted water until just crisp-tender, about 5 minutes. Drain beans and rinse under cold water. Pat dry with paper towels.
4. Wrap the beans in kitchen towels and place in a plastic bag. Chill until cold, at least 1 hour and up to 1 day.
5. Toss the cooled beans, mixed greens, and onion with enough dressing to coat. Season with salt and pepper. Garnish with sliced radishes if desired.
